readinessRationale: At least one verified compatible Nam Phái school-manual source exists (SRC-AA-V09-TAN-BIEN-1956) with checkable section/scan-page locators.
All 12 emitted-but-unreferenced annual stars have explicit adjudications in star-domain-policy.
At least one coherent candidate shape is source-backed (SHAPE-AAV09-THIEN-MA-MOVEMENT) using only Calculation Core-supported identity Lưu Thiên Mã.
Blocking contradiction CONTRA-AAV09-001 is adjudicated context-dependent and excluded from the candidate shape.
Five Core-blocked stars remain fail-closed and are not required by the candidate shape.

candidateShapes.name: Lưu Thiên Mã movement activation (bounded)
activationConditions: annual year-branch placement of Lưu Thiên Mã (Calculation Core + Tân Biên §4.4)
effect linked to the palace occupied during Tiểu hạn year
favorable co-presence with Lộc noted in §4.4; Tuần/Triệt án ngữ unfavorable (interpretive/conditional, not a numeric multiplier in this foundation)
excludedUnresolvedPolicies: Lưu Đào Hoa fixed polarity (CONTRA-AAV09-001 context-dependent)
numeric scoring for the other 11 unreferenced Core-emitted stars
engineeringParametersPending: point class / magnitude for Lưu Thiên Mã
which Annual Axes domains bind the star (career vs social vs palace-role mapping)
candidateShapes.expectedEffect: Adds a small annual-layer activation signal for movement/change years; modest help toward intra-year spread, not a full fix for the nine failed gates.
knownRisks: Limited star set may under-move distribution metrics
Over-binding to a single domain may misrepresent palace-context doctrine
Partial source access (OCR sections) — human re-check of physical edition still valuable
requiredControlAndHoldoutGates: product + holdout fixtures non-regression for V0.8 production path
